caption: A woman with curly brown hair and glasses is pictured in a home office setting, sitting at a desk and looking at a laptop screen. She wears a dark top and sits before a window with green foliage visible outside. Overlaid on the scene is a promotional advertisement for "VirtualShield." The text reads "Stay Home, Stay Protected. Extra 50% OFF," followed by a paragraph discussing COVID-19 and the importance of online security. A large price point of "$2.50 /month" is featured prominently. Below the text, there is a red button that says "Start Now for FREE" and a line stating, "Click the button above to claim your 50% discount!" The "VirtualShield" logo appears in the top left corner. Across the frames, the image remains static, with no visible movement or change in the woman's position or the on-screen text.
